rationale: Scope fence re-confirmed at 18b2624a. Exactly one commit past base (`git log --oneline spec/113-panel-verb-workflow-followups..HEAD` = 1 entry, 18b2624a). `git show --name-only 18b2624a` lists exactly the 6 declared files: the 5 from round 1 (internal/panel/create.go, internal/panel/create_test.go, cmd/mindspec/panel.go, cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go, .mindspec/domains/workflow/interfaces.md) plus internal/panel/panel_test.go. Via reflog I recovered the pre-amend round-1 SHA (d327cdce) and diffed it against 18b2624a: the ONLY delta is +85 lines, purely additive, in internal/panel/panel_test.go (new func TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues appended after the existing TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInert; no existing lines touched). interfaces.md diff between round 1 and round 2 is empty (0 lines) — byte-identical as claimed. All other files (create.go, create_test.go, panel.go, panel_test.go under cmd/mindspec) are also unchanged between rounds. Ran the new test directly: PASS (both allow and block-stale-sha subtests). `git status` clean. No scope creep, no out-of-fence files, no doc/code drift introduced by the amend.
